marketing.heroHeadline: Run your AI operations from one control center
marketing.heroSubheadline: Tasks, agents, and execution visibility for solo builders and teams.
marketing.trustBadge: Trusted workspace model for solo operators and teams
marketing.snapshotNoteBody: This feels like a serious control plane, not another lightweight task tool.

proofStrip.label: Task board + agent panel + live feed

marketing.productInActionSubtitle: Built from real feature surfaces in this app

visualCards.title: Task Board Lanes
visualCards.caption: Mirrors your real task workflow: Inbox to Review to Done.

visualCards.title: Agents Panel
visualCards.caption: Shows active/idle state exactly like your workspace agent operations.

visualCards.title: Live Feed
visualCards.caption: Category filters and event stream map to your existing activity feed.

marketing.operatorFlowBody: You define priorities in Sutraha HQ, OpenClaw executes through agent sessions, and MCP tools sync outcomes back into your workspace.
marketing.whyHeadline: Built for operators who care about quality, not noise
marketing.whyBody: Most tools optimize for activity. This one optimizes for shipped outcomes.
whyBullets: Clear accountability across humans and agents
Fast review loops without status meetings

segmentCards.title: Creator OS
segmentCards.text: Plan content, route tasks to agents, and track delivery without chaos.

segmentCards.title: Solo Founder Ops
segmentCards.text: Keep product, growth, support, and docs moving from one trusted workspace.

segmentCards.title: Business-Ready
segmentCards.text: Role controls and workspace separation designed for team expansion later.

marketing.trialSummary: Explore the workflow before enabling billing.
marketing.proSummary: For advanced operators and growing businesses.
marketing.finalCtaKicker: Ready to run like a real operator?
marketing.finalCtaHeadline: Build your next shipping system in Sutraha HQ
marketing.finalCtaBody: Move from scattered tools to one disciplined execution layer your customers can feel.
